headline: District Energy Innovation Award Might Change The Case For Investing In Johnson Controls International (JCI)
summary: Johnson Controls International recently received the 2026 Joseph M. Brillhart Innovation Award from the International District Energy Association for its work on the University of Windsor’s hybrid steam‑electric chiller project, which replaces an aging gas-fired boiler with a steam turbine centrifugal chiller and heat recovery steam generator. The award highlights how Johnson Controls’ advanced chiller and heat recovery technology can materially cut greenhouse gas emissions and sharply...

headline: Johnson Controls International (JCI) Wins Sustainability Award, Is The 9% Undervalued View Convincing?
summary: Johnson Controls award puts sustainability projects in focus for investors Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) just received the 2026 Joseph M. Brillhart Innovation Award for its hybrid steam-electric chiller project at the University of Windsor, a recognition that puts its sustainability capabilities on investors' radar. See our latest analysis for Johnson Controls International. Beyond this latest sustainability award, Johnson Controls International’s share price has risen 15.49% year...
